/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/task_manager_tests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/task_manager_tests.dir/tests/test_task_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/task_manager_tests.dir/tests/test_task_manager.cpp.o -o task_manager_tests  libtask_core.a
